info.name: BookShare
info.description: Postman collection for the BookShare microservices project. REST + GraphQL surfaces of the API gateway, each request paired with a real saved example response. gRPC requests live alongside in the same public workspace.

item.name: GraphQL
item.description: Single-endpoint flexible queries with cross-service field resolvers.

item.name: query book(id) — cross-service join (book + owner + my reservation)

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: query myReservations — borrower view with owner contact

response.name: 200 OK
